verses.text: Amfipolis khua leh Apollonia khua nawkin amaute zin uh a, Jew mite kikhopna inn a omna Thesalonika khua a tung uh hi
A pai ngei zel mah bangin Paul zong kikhopna inn-ah pai a, Sabbath ni thum sung Lai Siangtho siksanin mite tawh thu kikum a
Khrih in sihna thuakin, sihna panin a thawhkik ding a kisam ahi hi, ci-in a laktel hi. Tu-a note kiangah kong pulak Khrih pen Lai Siangtho sunga kigen Khrih ahi hi, ci-in Paul in a gen hi
Mi pawlkhat in a thugen uh man sa uh ahih manin Paul leh Silas pawlpih uh a, tua mah bangin Pasian a bia mi tampi tak leh uliante' zi tampi mah in zong a pawlpih uh hi

Tua bangin mi tampi in Paul' thugen a up uh ciangin Jew mite thangpai uh a, kongzing lakah a vakvai migilo honkhat kaikhawmin a pawlmat uh hi. Khuasung khempeuh buaisak henhanin, mihonte lakah Paul leh Silas a kaihkhiat theihna dingun Jason' inn a va simgawp uh hi

Tua inn-ah Paul leh Silas a muhloh uh ciangin a innteekpa Jason leh midang pawlkhat kaikhia-in uliante kiangah paipih uh a, “Hih mite in mun khempeuhah buaina piangsak uh hi. Tu-in i khuasung hong tung uh a
Jason in a inn-ah amaute tungsak hi. Amaute in gam khempeuh a uk Kumpipa' thu palsat uh a, Jesuh kici kumpi dang khat om hi, ci-in gen uh hi,” ci-in a awnggawp uh hi
Hih thu a zak uh ciangin mihonte leh khuasung uliante heh mahmah uh a
Jason leh a lawmte a kitatna ding uh sum a piaksak khit uh ciangin tua khuasung uliante in amaute a khah pan uh hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Berea khua-ah Mi tampi in Paul' Thugen Um

verses.text: Tua zan ciangin thu um mite in Berea khua-ah Paul leh Silas a paisak uh hi. Tua khua a tun' uh ciangin Jew mite kikhopna inn-ah a pai uh hi

Thesalonika khuamite sangin Berea khuamite in mipi lungsim neizaw uh hi. Amaute in lawp mahmahna tawh Paul' thugente ngai uh a, Paul' thugente man taktak hiam ci-in a theihna dingun nisimin Lai Siangtho a sim uh hi
Mi tampi in Pasian' thu um a, tuate sungah a cithei Grik numei tampi leh Grik mi pasal tampi a kihel uh hi
Berea khua-ah zong Paul in Pasian thu a hilhna a zak uh ciangin Thesalonika khua panin Jew mite hong pai-in Berea khua-ah zong mite hong holhthawh gawp uh hi
Tua ciangin thu um mite in tuipi gei-ah Paul paikhiatpih uh a, ahi zongin Silas leh Timoti pen Berea khua-ah a taam lai uh hi

Tuipi gei-ah Paul a paipih thu um mite in Athen khua ciangdong a va zui uh hi. Athen khua panin Berea khua-ah hong ciahkik uh ciangin, Silas leh Timoti in a manlang theithei-in hong delh uh hen, ci-in Paul' kam vaikhak thu a hong pua uh hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Paul in Athen khua-ah Thu Hilh

verses.text: Paul in Athen khua-ah Silas leh Timoti ngakin a om laitakin tua khuasungah milim a dimin a om lamtak mu ahih manin a lungsim ommawk theilo hi
Tua ahih manin Pasian a bia Jew mite leh Gentail mite tawh kikhopna inn sungah thu kikupna nei uh a, mihon kikhopna munah hong pai mi khempeuh tawh zong nisimin a kikum uh hi

Epikura thu ngaihsutzia leh Stoik thu ngaihsutzia a um mite pawlkhat, Paul tawh thu kinial uh a, “Hih mi kipilsak thu mawk gengenpa in bang gennuam ahi hiam?” cihsan uh a, pawlkhat in, “Minam dangte' pasian thu a gen tawh kibang hi,” a ci uh hi. Paul in Jesuh thu leh a thawhkikna thu hilh ahih manin hih bangin a gen uh ahi hi
Tua ahih manin amaute in Paul samin, Areopagas mualbo-ah paipih uh a, “Tu-a na gengen thuthakte ka theinuam uh hi
Tu-a na gengen ka zak uh thu pawlkhatte, ko-a' dingin a lamdangpi khat hi a, a thu a cingin ka theinuam uh hi,” a ci uh hi
(Athen khuamite leh tua khua-a om gamdang mite in thu thak la thak ngaihsunin kikup ding simloh thudang ngaihsutin neilo uh hi
Tua ahih manin Paul zong kikhopna mun Areopagas a kici mualbo tungah dingin, “Athen khua mite aw, biakna a hahkat mahmah mite na hihna uh ka thei hi

Na khuasung uhah ka pai kawmin na biakna munte uh ka et ciangin, ‘A Kitheilo Pasian-a' ding,’ ci-in biakna tau tungah lai a kigelh nangawn ka mu hi. Tu laitakin kei' hong pulak Pasian pen, theilo napi-in na biakbiak uh Pasian ahi hi
Tua Pasian pen leitung buppi leh a tunga om khempeuh a piangsak Pasian hi a, van leh lei a uk Topa ahih manin mihingte' lamsa biakinn sungah tenglo hi
Amah pen mi khempeuh tungah nuntakna leh na khempeuh a piapa ahih manin mihingte in ama-a' dingin na khat peuhpeuh a sepsak ding a kisam ahi kei hi
Mihing khat tung panin leitung minam khempeuh hong piangsakin, leitung khempeuhah a omsak hi. Amah in mihingte a pian'sakma pekin, mihingte' nuntak tanvei ding leh a ten'na ding uh mun a sehsa ahi hi
Hih bangin a hihna pen mite in amah zongin a muhtheihna ding uh a deihna ahi hi. Ahi zongin eite kiang panin Pasian gamla om hetlo hi
Mi khat in, ‘Pasian hangin eite piangin, hingin i gamtang hi,’ ci-in gen a, note sung panin laphuah siampa khat in zong, ‘Eite zong ama tate ihi hi,’ na na ci hi
Eite pen Pasian' tate ihih manin, mihing khutsiamte in bawlin a zep ngunte, khamte, suang milimte tawh a kibang dingin Pasian i ngaihsun kei ding hi
Pasian in mihingte' theihloh hun lai-a a gamtatnate uh phamawh a sakloh hangin, tu-in mun khempeuha om mi khempeuhte a gamtat siatna panun a kiheina dingun thu a hong pia khinzo hi

Amah in leitung mi khempeuh thu a mantakin ama teel mipa a hong khensakna ding ni a sehkhol khinzo hi. Tua a ngaihsutna a man taktak hi, ci-in mi khempeuh tungah a hong lahna dingin a teel mipa, sihna panin a hingkiksak zo hi,” ci-in thu a hilh hi
Sihna panin thawhkikna thu Paul in a gen a zak uh ciangin mi pawlkhat in zahpihbawl uh a, ahi zongin mi pawlkhat in, “Hih thu khatvei zakik nuam lai ung,” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin tua kikhopna panin Paul a paikhia hi
Mi pawlkhat in thu umin Paul pawlpih uh a, tuate lakah Areopagas mualbo-a thu vaihawm pawlsungah a kihel Dionisias, leh Damaris a kici numei khat, leh mi pawlkhat ahi uh hi.
